title: GS1 Catalog
description: Product catalog document (Lista de Precios / Catálogo). Supports DELTA_UPDATE (changed SKUs only) and FULL_SYNC (baseline reset using Merkle Root state vector). Embeds real-time inventory for offline sales apps (Kontext Pedidos). / Documento de catálogo de productos. Soporta DELTA_UPDATE y FULL_SYNC con vector de estado Merkle Root.

status.description: PUBLISHED catalogs are active. SUPERSEDED means a newer catalog has replaced this one. / Catálogos PUBLISHED están activos. SUPERSEDED indica que un catálogo más reciente lo ha reemplazado.

currency_base.description: Base currency for all pricing in this catalog. / Moneda base para todos los precios en este catálogo.

catalog_name.description: Human-readable catalog name. / Nombre legible del catálogo.

catalog_type.description: DELTA_UPDATE: only changed SKUs sent (efficient). FULL_SYNC: complete baseline reset, triggered automatically when receiver Merkle Root mismatches. MASTER_UPDATE: full product data without inventory. / DELTA_UPDATE: solo SKUs modificados. FULL_SYNC: restablecimiento completo del baseline.

includes_inventory.description: Whether this catalog includes real-time inventory quantities. Required for offline sales app (Kontext Pedidos). / Indica si el catálogo incluye cantidades de inventario en tiempo real.

sync_state.description: Merkle Root state vector for inventory synchronization. Enables 'Rsync-style' self-healing sync. Only present in DELTA_UPDATE and FULL_SYNC catalogs. / Vector de estado Merkle Root para sincronización de inventario.

sequence_id.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number. Receiver uses this to detect dropped deltas. / Número de secuencia monotónicamente creciente. El receptor lo usa para detectar deltas perdidos.

previous_merkle_root.description: Hash of the receiver's expected current state. If receiver's local hash != previous_merkle_root, trigger FULL_SYNC. Set to null for FULL_SYNC documents. / Hash del estado actual esperado del receptor. Si no coincide, disparar FULL_SYNC.

current_merkle_root.description: SHA-256 hash of the complete inventory state after applying this update. Receiver must verify their local hash matches this value after processing. / Hash SHA-256 del estado completo del inventario después de aplicar esta actualización.

total_active_skus.description: Total number of active SKUs in this catalog (for FULL_SYNC validation). / Número total de SKUs activos en este catálogo (para validación FULL_SYNC).

items.description: Array of catalog items. In DELTA_UPDATE, only changed items. In FULL_SYNC, all 1,450+ active SKUs. / Arreglo de ítems del catálogo.

action.description: INSERT: new SKU. UPDATE: changed price/inventory. DELETE: discontinued. UPSERT: used in FULL_SYNC (insert if not exists, update if exists). / INSERT: nuevo SKU. UPDATE: precio/inventario modificado. DELETE: descontinuado. UPSERT: usado en FULL_SYNC.

logistics.description: Packaging and logistics details for this SKU. / Detalles de empaque y logística para este SKU.

uom_sales.description: Unit of measure for sales (Caja, Unidad, Blister). / Unidad de medida para ventas.

master_carton_qty.description: Number of sales units in a master carton (for bulk ordering). / Cantidad de unidades de venta en un cartón maestro.

tax_profile.description: Tax profile for this SKU. IVA exemptions must be set here to propagate correctly to orders and invoices. / Perfil fiscal de este SKU. Las exenciones de IVA deben definirse aquí para propagarse correctamente.

pricing_tiers.description: Multi-tier pricing array. Supports volume discounts (min order qty), date-bound promotions, and multi-currency pricing (USD + VES). / Arreglo de niveles de precio multi-tier.

tier_code.description: Pricing tier identifier. / Identificador del nivel de precio.

unit_price_net.description: Net unit price after distributor discounts, before taxes. / Precio unitario neto después de descuentos del distribuidor, antes de impuestos.

msrp_usd.description: Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price in USD. Helps pharmacy POS suggest the correct end-consumer price. / Precio de Venta Sugerido al Público en USD.

msrp_ves.description: Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price in VES. / Precio de Venta Sugerido al Público en VES.

exchange_rate_pegged.description: BCV exchange rate used to fix VES prices. Only for RETAIL_VES tiers. / Tasa BCV usada para fijar precios en VES. Solo para niveles RETAIL_VES.

inventory.description: Real-time inventory snapshot. Embedded in catalog for offline sales enablement (Kontext Pedidos). / Instantánea del inventario en tiempo real. Incluida en el catálogo para habilitación de ventas offline.

status.description: Inventory availability status. Offline apps use this to prevent stockout orders. / Estado de disponibilidad de inventario.
